entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of managing pests, diseases, and weeds to protect crops and ensure productivity

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of the amount of crop yield produced per unit area

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Synthetic substances applied to soil or plants to provide nutrients

entities.name: PATHOCIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to kill pathogens

entities.name: AGRONOMICAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Scientific methods of crop production and soil management

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that damage crops

entities.name: PLANT DISEASES
entities.description: Abnormal conditions in plants caused by pathogens or environmental stress

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The natural world, including air, water, and soil, affected by agricultural chemicals

entities.name: CONSUMER HEALTH
entities.description: The physical well-being of people consuming agricultural products

entities.name: PATHOGENS
entities.description: Disease-causing organisms that attack plants

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: An eco-friendly approach to managing plant diseases using living organisms

entities.name: BIOCONTROL AGENTS
entities.description: Living organisms used to suppress plant pathogens

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: A group of spore-producing organisms used as biocontrol agents

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Single-celled microorganisms used as biocontrol agents

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: FIELD ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The evaluation of agricultural treatments in actual field conditions

entities.name: MICROBIAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Groups of microorganisms interacting within a specific environment

entities.name: CULTURE-INDEPENDENT MOLECULAR TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to analyze microbes without needing to grow them in a lab

entities.name: SEQUENCING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to determine the nucleic acid sequence of DNA or RNA

entities.name: GENOMICS INFORMATION
entities.description: Data derived from the study of the complete set of genes of an organism
